title: Time Tracking reporting by assigned resource, by week, by project
excerpt:
I am looking for an app or widget that will leverage the time tracking column. 
I would like to be able to analyse the data by the following metrics 
Assigned Person 
Time period (by day, by week, by month, duration) 
Pr…

posts.author: jacquigraham (Jacqui)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for an app or widget that will leverage the time tracking column.

I would like to be able to analyse the data by the following metrics
Assigned Person
Time period (by day, by week, by month, duration)
Project

Please provide suggested solutions.

Thankyou

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
@jacquigraham

welcome to the monday

Many project management platforms have built-in reporting features that can work with your time tracking column.

Asana is also suitable for your request which are: Assigned Person
Time period (by day, by week, by month, duration).
What do you say

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml: @jacquigraham I suggest taking a look at the Analytics & Reports by Screenful. With it, you can create charts using the time tracking data and place the charts on Monday dashboard or schedule to be sent via email. You can learn more from this guide .

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. My team actually created a custom coded solution in this domain. It’s a board view that allows you to choose time tracking columns on multiple boards to pull excel reports from where the time is grouped by person/board. Maybe it’ll help some teams out. It’s a private app and just a prototype for now but you can install it with this link. Let me know if you find it useful.
